PLACEK_WEGIERSKI.NAME: Hungarian-Style Potato Pancake
PLACEK_WEGIERSKI.INFO: Crispy potato pancake served with a flavorful pork goulash with onions in a tomato sauce.

SCHAB_NA_TRZY.NAME: Three-Way Pork Loin
SCHAB_NA_TRZY.INFO: Three small pork loin cutlets: classic, topped with braised cabbage, and topped with bacon and cheese. Served with a choice of French fries or skin-on potatoes, accompanied by a selection of fresh salads.

KOTLET_DRWALA.NAME: Lumberjack Cutlet
KOTLET_DRWALA.INFO: Classic breaded pork cutlet baked with grilled bacon, bell pepper, onion and cheese. Served with a choice of French fries or skin-on potatoes, accompanied by a selection of fresh salads.

ROLADKA_SCHABOWA.NAME: Pork Loin Roll
ROLADKA_SCHABOWA.INFO: Pork loin roll stuffed with mushrooms and onion. Served with a choice of French fries or skin-on potatoes, accompanied by a selection of fresh salads.

CORDON_BLEU.NAME: Cordon Bleu
CORDON_BLEU.INFO: Classic breaded pork cutlet baked with ham, cheese and mustard. Served with a choice of French fries or skin-on potatoes, accompanied by a selection of fresh salads.

KOTLET_SCHABOWY.NAME: Breaded Pork Cutlet
KOTLET_SCHABOWY.INFO: Traditional breaded pork cutlet, fried until golden and crispy. Served with a choice of French fries or skin-on potatoes, accompanied by a selection of fresh salads.

GRILLOWANY_FILET.NAME: Grilled Chicken Fillet
GRILLOWANY_FILET.INFO: Juicy grilled chicken fillet baked with tomatoes, basil and mozzarella cheese. Served with a choice of French fries or skin-on potatoes, accompanied by a selection of fresh salads.

FILET_ZE_SZPINAKIEM.NAME: Chicken Fillet in an Omelette
FILET_ZE_SZPINAKIEM.INFO: Juicy chicken fillet with spinach and sun-dried tomatoes, wrapped in a delicate omelette. Served with a choice of French fries or skin-on potatoes, accompanied by a selection of fresh salads.

PIERS_W_SEZAMIE.NAME: Sesame-Crusted Chicken Breast
PIERS_W_SEZAMIE.INFO: Juicy chicken breast coated in a crispy sesame crust. Served with a choice of French fries or skin-on potatoes, accompanied by a selection of fresh salads.

SER_SMAZONY.NAME: Fried Cheese with Cranberry Sauce
SER_SMAZONY.INFO: Golden-fried breaded cheese served with cranberry sauce. Accompanied by French fries and a selection of fresh salads.

SKRZYDELKA.NAME: Chicken Wings
SKRZYDELKA.INFO: Juicy chicken wings, crispy on the outside and tender inside, served hot.

NUGGETSY.NAME: Chicken Nuggets
NUGGETSY.INFO: Breaded pieces of juicy chicken breast, fried until golden and crispy on the outside, tender on the inside

PLACKI_ZIEMNIACZANE.NAME: Potato Pancakes with Sour Cream
PLACKI_ZIEMNIACZANE.INFO: Traditional crispy potato pancakes served hot with sour cream.

POKUSA.NAME: Pokusa

ASPRI_SALAD.NAME: Aspri
ASPRI_SALAD.INFO: Iceberg lettuce, chicken, tomato, fresh cucumber, red onion, sweetcorn, feta cheese, egg, yogurt dressing, served with toast.

PIEROGI_RUSKIE.NAME: Ruthenian Dumplings
PIEROGI_RUSKIE.INFO: Traditional dumplings filled with potatoes and farmer's cheese.

ZUREK.NAME: Polish Żurek Soup with Egg
ZUREK.INFO: Traditional Polish sour soup made with house-made starter, served with egg.

POMIDOROWA.NAME: Tomato Soup with Pasta
POMIDOROWA.INFO: Traditional tomato soup served with pasta.

KAPUSTA_ZASMAZANA.NAME: Braised Sauerkraut
KAPUSTA_ZASMAZANA.INFO: Stewed sauerkraut with onion, lightly fried until golden.

BUKIET_SUROWEK.NAME: Salad Selection
BUKIET_SUROWEK.INFO: A selection of fresh vegetable salads.

SOSY.NAME: Sauces
SOSY.INFO: Sauce selection: garlic, ketchup, mayonnaise, mustard, sour cream.

MALINY_NA_GORACO.NAME: Hot Raspberries
MALINY_NA_GORACO.INFO: Warm raspberries served with vanilla ice cream and whipped cream.

PUCHAR_LODOWY.NAME: Ice Cream Sundae
PUCHAR_LODOWY.INFO: Ice cream served with whipped cream and sauce.

MANGO_MARGARITA.INFO: Triple Sec Liqueur, Tequila, Lime Juice, Mango Purée

BLUE_FLAME.INFO: Vodka, Passion Fruit Purée, Grenadine Syrup, Blue Curaçao Syrup

MANGO_TANGO.NAME: Mango Tango x4
MANGO_TANGO.INFO: Vodka, Peach Liqueur, Mango Syrup, Lemon Juice

LAGUNA.NAME: Laguna
LAGUNA.INFO: 250ml Beer, Orange Juice, Blue Curaçao Syrup

PAPARUDA_NEGRA.NAME: Paparuđa Feteasca Neagra
PAPARUDA_NEGRA.INFO: Dry wine made 100% from Feteasca Neagra grapes. In the glass it shows a ruby color. The nose reveals violet and dried cherry notes, intertwined with hints of tobacco. On the palate it is juicy and light, with berry accents and a smooth, velvety finish.

PAPARUDA_MERLOT.NAME: Paparuđa Merlot
PAPARUDA_MERLOT.INFO: An intensely aromatic bouquet reveals plum and forest fruit notes, perfectly combined with spicy, vanilla accents and hints of pepper. Thanks to its subtle sweetness and well-balanced acidity, it is an excellent choice both for everyday drinking and special occasions.

DORNFELDER.NAME: Dornfelder Lieblich
DORNFELDER.INFO: This wine delights with an intense aroma of ripe fruits such as blackcurrants, cherries, and berries, with a subtle hint of spice. It has a smooth character and pairs perfectly with desserts, blue cheeses, light meats, or enjoyed on its own. Ideal for lovers of gently sweet, full-flavored wines.

SCHWARZE_MADCHENTRAUBE.NAME: Schwarze Mädchentraube
SCHWARZE_MADCHENTRAUBE.INFO: It features intense aromas of ripe fruits such as blackcurrants, plums, and cherries, with a subtle floral hint. Its sweetness is well balanced, making it an excellent choice for desserts, chocolate cakes, blue cheeses, or relaxing moments.

PINOT_GRIGIO_ANTONIO_FACCHIN.NAME: Pinot Grigio Antonio Facchin
PINOT_GRIGIO_ANTONIO_FACCHIN.INFO: Fresh and light wine with delicate aromas of citrus, green apple, and white flowers. On the palate it is crisp, well-balanced, with pleasant acidity and a clean, refreshing finish. Perfect with salads, fish, and light dishes.

PAPARUDA_CHARDONNAY.NAME: Paparuđa Chardonnay
PAPARUDA_CHARDONNAY.INFO: A wine with a distinctive spicy aroma, featuring notes of ripe yellow and exotic fruits, berries, and grapes. Hints of candied fruit, grass, and subtle spice add complexity and depth.

PAPARUDA_FETEASCA_REGALA.NAME: Paparuđa Feteasca Regală
PAPARUDA_FETEASCA_REGALA.INFO: A fresh, light wine with a distinct fruity character. The aroma is dominated by light fruits such as pear and apple, with subtle hints of exotic fruit. On the palate it is smooth and harmonious, with gentle sweetness and a refreshing finish.

SANTA_CRUZ_WHITE_VERDEJO.NAME: Santa Cruz White Verdejo PFI
SANTA_CRUZ_WHITE_VERDEJO.INFO: A pleasant, delicate wine with tropical notes of pineapple and mango. Freshness is enhanced by hints of green apple. On the palate it is light, naturally sweet, fresh and harmonious, with a fruity character and good acidity typical of Verdejo.

TALERZ_ROZMAITOSCI.NAME: Variety Platter
TALERZ_ROZMAITOSCI.INFO: French Fries, Sweet Potato Fries, Potato Wedges, Onion Rings, Chicken Nuggets, Chicken Wings, and Dipping Sauces.
